title: EtherTools
description: Administrative module Administrative menu for series, events, and public servers
body:
Is a Forge & Fabric mod designed to manage Minecraft
series, events, and public servers in a fast and interactive way.

The mod adds an Administrative Tablet exclusively for admins,
allowing you to control multiple server features through an
easy-to-use interactive menu.

### **⚙ MAIN FEATURES**

✔ Enable / Disable PVP
  (non-OP players only)

✔ Enable / Disable block breaking

✔ Enable / Disable block placing

✔ Enable / Disable voice chat
  (Simple Voice Chat-luckperms)

✔ Enable / Disable fall damage

✔ Enable / Disable day & night cycle

✔ Enable / Disable rain

✔ Enable / Disable text chat

✔ Freeze / Unfreeze all players



![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/224726a6be45f64129b775bbfe35626ec041d9b3.png)


### 🛠 QUICK ACTIONS
### 
✔ TP everyone to me
  (except OP players)

✔ GM A for everyone

✔ GM S for everyone

✔ Kill everyone XD

✔ TP spectators to me

✔ /setspawn and /spawn commands

### 👤 PLAYER MANAGEMENT
### 
EtherTools also includes an individual player editor,
allowing admins to manage specific actions for each player.

You can prevent a player from:

✖ Moving (freeze player)

✖ Breaking blocks
✖ Placing blocks
✖ Using text chat
✖ Using voice chat

All of these options are fully configurable.


![PLAYER MENU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/545a8fc4c7cfbead2c3ef0e99ec643d127957e61.png)




### 📁 CONFIGURATION
### 
🔹 Forge:
world/serverconfig/ethertools-server.toml

🔹 Fabric:
config/ethertools-server.json

### 📌 INFORMATION
### 
✔ Compatible with Forge & Fabric

✔ Administrative tablet with its own creative tab

✔ Only admins can use the tablet

✔ Constantly updated

✔ Used by EtherStudio to manage and moderate
  Minecraft events and series
